title: draba arbuscula
intro: Draba arbuscula, also known as alpine whitlowgrass, is a small, annual or biennial plant belonging to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Draba arbuscula has been used to treat various health conditions, such as bronchitis, coughs, and skin irritations, due to its health benefits, including expectorant and antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its herbal applications.
